name: intrackt-extension
description: Tracks job application statuses directly from your inbox using React.

scripts.start: powershell -Command "if (-not $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR) { $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'parcel-cache-threadhq' }; $cache = $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR; parcel watch popup/public/index.html --dist-dir popup/dist --public-url ./ --cache-dir $cache"
scripts.clean: powershell -Command "$dist = if ($env:DIST_DIR) { $env:DIST_DIR } else { 'popup/dist' }; if (Test-Path $dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.build: powershell -Command "if (-not $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR) { $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'parcel-cache-threadhq' }; $cache = $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR; $dist = if ($env:DIST_DIR) { $env:DIST_DIR } else { 'popup/dist' }; if (Test-Path $dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; parcel build popup/public/index.html background.js --dist-dir $dist --no-source-maps --public-url ./ --cache-dir $cache; $mf = if ($env:MANIFEST_FILE) { $env:MANIFEST_FILE } else { 'manifest.json' }; Copy-Item $mf (Join-Path $dist 'manifest.json') -Force; if (Test-Path 'content.js') { Copy-Item 'content.js' (Join-Path $dist 'content.js') -Force }; if (Test-Path 'icons') { Copy-Item -Recurse icons $dist/ -Force }; $index = Join-Path $dist 'popup/public/index.html'; if (Test-Path $index) { (Get-Content $index) -replace 'href=public\.', 'href=../../public.' -replace 'src=public\.', 'src=../../public.' | Set-Content $index }"
scripts.package: npm run build && powershell -Command "$dist = if ($env:DIST_DIR) { $env:DIST_DIR } else { 'popup/dist' }; if (-not $env:EXT_VERSION) { $env:EXT_VERSION = 'dev' }; Compress-Archive -Path (Join-Path $dist '*') -DestinationPath intrackt-extension-v$env:EXT_VERSION.zip -Force"
